title: grewia hispida
intro: Grewia hispida, also known as the spiny bedstraw or hairy grapple, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Grewia hispida include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Grewia hispida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
